description: A bit more about Cecylia — work, speaking, reading, and where to find me online.

paragraphs: I'm a generalist: lots of interests, never quite enough time for all of them. I write this site in English and Polish about tech, everyday life, and culture — observations, things I'm learning, and whatever else I want to think through in public.

sections.heading: Work
paragraphs: Currently I work at Splunk, building tools for other developers. As a true generalist, I don't have favorite technology or area of expertise. I take the biggest satisfaction from learning new things.

Before Splunk, I worked at several different companies across Europe on many different projects. TRUE GENERALIST. From enhancing 4G connectivity at Nokia,  through improving compatibility for millions of Windows users, to developing a mission-critical emergency management application at eurofunk Kappacher.

sections.heading: Current hobbies
paragraphs: Recently I finally bought a second hand camera (Sony a6000 with Sigma C 18-50mm f/2.8 lens) and have been learning photography. It's something I wanted to do for years and I am so happy to be finally doing it. Yay!
I'm active in Toastmasters. The older I am, the more I realize that everything in life is about communication. And it is a life long journey to master it. I also love the people in my club!
